readme: Mal - Transaction Purpose Code Catalog (v1.0 draft)
Scope: customer-selectable purpose-of-payment codes per transaction flow. One tab per flow: C2C, C2B, B2C, B2B, Mal2Mal (on-us).
1. Purpose selection is MANDATORY on every customer-initiated transfer. No purpose = transaction cannot be submitted.
2. Show ONLY the purpose list matching the flow type (payer segment x payee segment). Flow type is derived by the system, never chosen by the customer.

3. Store: purpose_code + catalog_version + free_text (if any) on the transaction record, immutably. Pass purpose_code and free text to Oscilar / AiPrise in the screening payload (purpose/memo fields) - this closes the "reason of payment cross-checking" gap.
4. "Other" requires free text (min 10 characters), is rate-limited per customer per month, and auto-routes to REVIEW above the tier threshold.

5. Some purposes are HARD-GATED (see Evidence column): licensed-charity whitelist, licensed-VASP whitelist, same-name (CoP) checks, segment-gated purposes (e.g., insurance payout only for insurer-segment businesses), group-relationship registry for intercompany.
6. Risk Tier drives: evidence prompts, threshold tiers in the TM engines, and review routing. Tiers map to the dynamic customer risk model - thresholds are per CRR band, not global.
a. Purpose-vs-behavior cross-check: declared purpose must be consistent with observed pattern (e.g., "salary" inbound must show payroll cadence). Purpose misuse is itself a monitored typology.
b. "Other"-usage rate, purpose-switching frequency, and purpose-vs-MCC mismatch are KRIs per customer and per partner/program.
c. Approved-pattern matching (Oscilar) should key on purpose_code + counterparty + amount band to auto-approve repeat legitimate flows.

- CBUAE POP Mapping column is INDICATIVE. Validate every code against the latest CBUAE UAEFTS / IPP (Aani) purpose-of-payment list before dev freeze; codes marked TBC are uncertain. Cross-border rails may require different/additional codes.
- This catalog is a compliance-design artifact, not legal advice. Final list requires CO/MLRO sign-off and, where applicable, alignment with CBUAE rulebook and scheme requirements.
- Risk tiers and evidence thresholds shown are design defaults - calibrate per the enterprise-wide risk assessment and document the rationale (tuning evidence).

C2C.title: C2C - Individual to Individual (external / off-us)
C2C.subtitle: Customer-selectable purposes when a Mal individual pays another individual outside Mal. CBUAE POP mapping indicative - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Money sent to family members for living expenses.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Regular or ad-hoc support to declared family members, domestic or cross-border remittance.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Payments to many unrelated "family" recipients; inbound-outbound pass-through labelled family support.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Above tier threshold: relationship declaration; recurring high value: source of funds.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Baseline corridor & counterparty set; salary-mimicry and funnel checks; remittance-segment peer model.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: A personal gift to a friend or relative.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: High-frequency "gifts" (layering cover); gifts from recent unknown counterparties (scam/mule cover).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Value above tier: purpose free-text + relationship; pattern of gifts: review.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Frequency cap per period; new-counterparty conjunction; scam-victim pattern overlay.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Splitting bills, rent share, trips or group expenses.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Reimbursement between individuals for genuinely shared costs.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Structured many-to-one collections; settlement flows with no matching lifestyle spend.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Fan-in dispersion vs profile; expects rough symmetry with card/lifestyle spend.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Monthly rent paid to a private landlord.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Recurring fixed-amount rent to one counterparty.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Multiple "landlords"; varying amounts inconsistent with tenancy; rent to high-risk geography.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Tenancy contract on request above threshold.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Recurring-pattern whitelisting candidate (approved-pattern matching); amount/beneficiary stability checks.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Lending your own money to someone you know.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Occasional loan from own funds to a declared personal contact.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Serial "loans" to many parties (unlicensed lending); loan-back round-trips.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Relationship + expected repayment declaration; repeated use forces review.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Circular-flow detection (loan out / repayment in); unlicensed-lending frequency rule.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Repaying money previously borrowed from an individual.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Repayment consistent with a prior declared borrowing.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Repayments with no visible prior loan; repayment chains across parties (layering).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Reference to original loan above threshold.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Pairing test with prior inbound; sequence-motif check (in-out chains).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying or supporting tuition/school costs of an individual.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Support to a student (fees, allowance, materials).
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: "Education" flows to non-student-profile adults; seasonal mismatch with academic calendar.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Seasonality model (term dates); corridor consistency.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Helping someone pay for medical treatment.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Ad-hoc transfer for verifiable medical need.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Recurring high-value "medical" transfers as remittance cover.
entries.cbuae_pop_mapping_indicative_validate: MCR (TBC - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list)
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Supporting evidence on request above threshold.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: One-off spike tolerance with evidence flag; repeat-use review.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying salary to household staff (maid, driver, nanny).
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Regular wage to registered domestic worker.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Payroll-like fan-out to many "workers" from an individual (funnel/ghost-worker).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Worker permit/contract above threshold; count cap per household.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Salary-mimicry detection inverted: verify payer is plausible household employer; fan-out cap.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying a person for a used item (car, furniture, phone).
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: High-frequency "purchases" (informal trading/unlicensed business on personal account).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Frequency rule detecting undeclared business use; ties to business-misuse scenario.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Court-ordered or agreed family maintenance.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Irregular amounts/parties inconsistent with maintenance.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Recurring-pattern whitelisting candidate.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Moving money to your own account at another bank.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Same-name transfers to self at another institution.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Name mismatch at receiving side (CoP); "own account" used to break audit trail before dispersal.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Same-name verification (CoP) mandatory - hard control, not evidence.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: CoP mismatch = block/review; velocity of self-transfers feeding layering scenario.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Direct help to a person in need (not a charity).
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Crowd-collection into one individual (unlicensed fundraising / TF risk); high-risk corridor destinations.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Low per-txn cap; aggregation review; corridor restrictions apply.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Fan-in collection detection; TF-scenario conjunction; NPO-diversion overlay.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Any purpose not listed - describe it.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Vague/repeated "other" usage to avoid classification.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Free text mandatory (min 10 chars); auto-review above tier threshold; monthly usage cap.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: "Other"-rate per customer is itself a KRI; keyword scan on free text feeds screening.

C2B.title: C2B - Individual to Business
C2B.subtitle: Customer-selectable purposes when a Mal individual pays a business. CBUAE POP mapping indicative - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying a business for goods bought.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Retail/online purchase of goods from a licensed business.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Goods payments to businesses with no goods trade (transaction laundering).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Merchant-category consistency; MCC-vs-purpose cross-check.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying a business for services received.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Professional, personal or technical services from a licensed provider.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Round-amount recurring "services" with no service footprint (invoice-cover).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Round-amount + recurrence conjunction; service-plausibility vs customer profile.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Electricity, water, telecom, internet bills.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a - closed beneficiary set.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Whitelist beneficiary registry; anomaly only on amount outliers.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Rent paid to a property company or agent.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Recurring rent/lease to licensed real-estate entity.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Multiple simultaneous rents; rent >> declared income.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Affordability vs income-consistency dimension; recurring whitelisting.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Tuition and education fees.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Fees for unrelated third parties at scale.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Seasonality (term dates); third-party-payer flag.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Hospital, clinic, pharmacy payments.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a - closed set largely.
entries.cbuae_pop_mapping_indicative_validate: MCR (TBC - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list)
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Amount-outlier only.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying for an insurance policy.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Early surrender adjacency (premium in, surrender out) - insurance ML typology.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Premium-vs-surrender sequence overlay with insurer data where available.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Repaying a loan, credit card or financing.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Third-party repayments of unrelated customers loans.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Third-party-repayment detection (payer != borrower).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Government services, fines, taxes, visas.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a - closed set.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Whitelist registry.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Donation to a licensed charity/NPO.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Donations to unlicensed collectors; high-risk-geography NPOs.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Licensed-charity whitelist enforced as hard control; cap per period configurable.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: NPO-diversion overlay; corridor checks on charity onward flows (where visible).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Funding a licensed investment/brokerage account.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Transfers to regulated investment platforms in own name.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Funding third-party investment accounts; unregulated "investment" schemes (Ponzi red flag).
entries.cbuae_pop_mapping_indicative_validate: FIS (TBC - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list)
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Same-name rule preferred; platform must be licensed/whitelisted.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Unregulated-beneficiary detection; investment-scam pattern (many customers -> same new business).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Funding an account at a licensed virtual asset provider.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Transfers to VARA/SCA-licensed VASPs in own name.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Unlicensed VASPs; P2P crypto brokers posing as businesses; rapid in-convert-out.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Licensed-VASP whitelist; same-name; velocity caps by tier.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Crypto-exposure scenario (5.20): conduit-shape detection, chain-analytics enrichment where available.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Airlines, hotels, travel agencies, tickets.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a largely.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Feeds geographic-behavior model (travel inference reduces false positives on foreign spend).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Recurring digital or club subscriptions.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: High-value "subscriptions" (miscoded transfers).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Amount ceiling heuristic per category.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Buying a vehicle from a dealer.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Luxury-asset integration (cash-origin funds into vehicles).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Source of funds above threshold (integration-stage control).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Lifestyle-vs-income check; high-value-asset registry of events.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Any purpose not listed - describe it.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Repeated vague usage.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Free text mandatory; auto-review above tier.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: "Other"-rate KRI; keyword scan feeds screening.

B2C.title: B2C - Business to Individual
B2C.subtitle: Purposes when a Mal business pays an individual. Several purposes are licence- or segment-gated. CBUAE POP mapping indicative - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Monthly salary payment to an employee.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Payroll to registered employees (WPS-aligned where applicable).
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Payroll to non-employees; ghost-employee fan-out; salary amounts inconsistent with declared headcount/turnover.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Employee registration; payroll-to-headcount plausibility at review.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Payroll behavior model (cadence/amount regularity); fake-payroll and ghost-employee scenarios.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Recurring employee allowance (housing, transport).
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Allowances >> salary norms; allowances to non-employees.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Ratio check allowance:salary per employee.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Performance bonus or incentive payment.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Round large "bonuses" to owners relatives outside payroll cycle.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Off-cycle detection vs payroll calendar.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Overtime payment to an employee.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a largely.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Ratio vs base salary.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Final settlement to a departing employee.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Repeated EOS to same person; EOS to active employees.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: One-per-employee rule; sequence check with salary stop.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Advance salary for leave period.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a largely.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Calendar plausibility.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Pension to a retired individual.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a largely.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Recurring whitelisting.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying an individual for contracted services.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Payment to permit-holding freelancers/contractors against invoice.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Disguised employment at scale; contractor fan-out mimicking payroll (agent-misuse); payments to sanctioned-adjacent individuals.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Fan-out dispersion; payroll-mimicry inversion; screening of beneficiary set.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Commission to an individual agent or introducer.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Commissions with no sales linkage (kickback/bribery cover); commissions to PEP-linked individuals.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Agreement + sales linkage above threshold; PEP screening of beneficiaries.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Corruption overlay: commission-to-revenue ratio; PEP/adverse-media conjunction.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Profit distribution to a shareholder.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Dividends to non-shareholders (hidden-ownership signal); dividends >> plausible profits.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Shareholder-registry match (ties to UBO data); profit plausibility at review.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Beneficial-ownership inconsistency scenario (5.23): control-vs-declared test.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Refunding an individual customer.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Refund matching a prior inbound payment.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Refunds without matching sale (refund laundering); refund fan-out.
entries.cbuae_pop_mapping_indicative_validate: POR (TBC - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list)
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Pairing with original transaction enforced systemically.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Refund-pairing test; refund-ratio anomaly (merchant-risk scenario).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Reimbursing an employee for business expenses.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Structured reimbursements as salary substitute (evasion) or extraction channel.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Ratio vs payroll; recurrence pattern.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Business lending to an individual (if licensed).
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Any lending by non-licensed business = prohibited use.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Licence verification hard gate; unlicensed = decline + review account purpose.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Unlicensed-MSB/lending detection; pass-through overlay.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Insurer paying a claim to an individual.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a for licensed insurers.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Licence-gated purpose (only insurer-segment businesses may select).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Segment-gating control: purpose availability by business activity code.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Competition or promotional winnings.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: "Prizes" as disguised transfers (lottery-scam typology; TF cover).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Promotion permit; beneficiary caps; frequency caps.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Prize-payout fan-out detection; scam-pattern overlay.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Any purpose not listed - describe it.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Repeated vague usage.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Free text mandatory; auto-review above tier.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: "Other"-rate KRI per business is a partner-oversight metric.

B2B.title: B2B - Business to Business
B2B.subtitle: Purposes when a Mal business pays another business. CBUAE POP mapping indicative - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying a supplier for goods.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Settlement of supplier invoices for goods, domestic.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Goods payments inconsistent with business activity (front-company signal); round-amount invoice grids.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Industry-context check: supplier set plausibility vs licence activity (business-misuse scenario 5.22).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying a foreign supplier for imported goods.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Cross-border settlement for imports with shipping evidence.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Over/under-invoicing; phantom shipments; payment to third country unrelated to trade (TBML).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Above threshold: invoice + transport doc sampling; dual-use goods screening.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: TBML scenario (5.15): unit-price outliers, corridor risk, third-party-payment detection.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Receiving or forwarding proceeds for goods sold.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Export receipt handling and related onward payments.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Proceeds routed via unrelated intermediaries.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: As B2B-02, inbound side.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Legal, audit, consulting, marketing services.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Services from licensed providers against engagement/invoice.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Vague "consulting/management fees" (classic shell-payment label); fees to secrecy jurisdictions.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Engagement letter + deliverable description above threshold.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Shell-activity red flags: consulting-fee share of outflows; counterparty-web opacity.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Software, cloud, technical support services.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Software-license flows as IP-mispricing channel.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Recurring-vendor whitelisting; price-step anomalies.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Commercial rent or equipment lease.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Multiple premises inconsistent with operations.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Operational-footprint consistency (revenue vs premises).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Business utility payments.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Footprint input to business-misuse checks (revenue without utilities = front).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Funding payroll via WPS/payroll provider.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Transfers to licensed payroll/WPS agents matching registered wage files.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Payroll funding >> declared headcount (ghost workers at scale).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Payroll-to-headcount analytics; agent-misuse overlay.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Transfers between declared group entities.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Treasury/funding flows between entities with declared common ownership.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Undeclared "group" transfers (hidden ownership); circular intra-group round-trips manufacturing turnover.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Group-relationship registry mandatory before purpose is selectable; auditor-confirmed structure at EDD.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Declared-relationship whitelisting for sweep patterns; circular-flow detection stays ON with netting (5.9).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Profit distribution to corporate shareholder.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Dividends to entities outside declared ownership chain.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Ownership-inconsistency scenario (5.23).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Lending between related businesses.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Loan-back schemes (money returns as "loan"); cash-collateral loans repaid by unrelated parties.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Loan agreement + board approval above threshold.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Loan-back typology: pairing of disbursement/repayment across the graph; third-party-repayment detection.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Commission to another business (agent, broker).
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Commission per agency agreement with sales linkage.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Agency fees to shell intermediaries (bribery/kickback conduit).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Corruption overlay; intermediary-web analysis.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: License fees for intellectual property.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: IP fees as profit-shifting/mispricing channel to low-transparency jurisdictions.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: License agreement; pricing basis at review.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Transfer-pricing-style outlier tests; corridor risk.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Progress payments to contractors.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Progress payments without project evidence; procurement-corruption patterns.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Milestone-cadence plausibility; procurement red-flag overlay.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Shipping, freight, customs services.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Freight costs inconsistent with declared trade volumes (TBML cost leg).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Linked to trade docs where applicable.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Ties into TBML scenario as corroborating leg.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Business insurance premiums.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a largely.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Amount outliers only.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Corporate taxes, customs duties, government fees.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Whitelist registry; customs-duty vs import-volume consistency feeds TBML checks.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Equity investment into another business.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: "Investments" into shells; capital round-tripping.
entries.cbuae_pop_mapping_indicative_validate: CEA (TBC - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list)
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Share documents + UBO refresh of investee at threshold.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Ownership-change trigger into CRR; round-trip detection.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Corporate donation to licensed charity.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Donations to unlicensed/foreign collectors.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: NPO overlay as C2B-10.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Any purpose not listed - describe it.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Repeated vague usage.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Free text mandatory; auto-review above tier.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: "Other"-rate KRI per business; keyword scan feeds screening.

Mal2Mal.title: Mal2Mal - On-us transfers between Mal customers
Mal2Mal.subtitle: On-us transfers between Mal accounts. Sub-Flow column tells the developer which counterparty pairing the purpose belongs to. POP mapping kept for reporting consistency even though transfers are internal. CBUAE POP mapping indicative - validate vs latest CBUAE UAEFTS/IPP purpose-of-payment list.

entries.customer_facing_label: Transfer between my own Mal accounts
entries.description_shown_to_customer: Moving money between your own Mal accounts/wallets.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: n/a - but velocity still monitored (pre-positioning before extraction).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Self-transfer velocity feeds layering pre-stage detection.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Support to a family member who also uses Mal.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: As C2C-01.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Full graph visibility on-us: fan-in/fan-out and community detection run at full strength.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Gift to another Mal user.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: As C2C-02.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: As C2C-02 + device-sharing checks (both sides visible).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Splitting bills with Mal friends.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Structured collection rings inside the platform.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: On-us collection-ring detection (community + device graph).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying a Mal user for a used item.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Informal trading networks inside platform.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Seller-pattern detection: many buyers -> one individual = undeclared business (route to SME book).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying a Mal business for goods.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Purchase from an onboarded Mal SME.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Collusive buyer-seller rings (fake sales as placement).
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Cross-book scenario: buyer-seller collusion via shared device/UBO link (both books visible internally).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Paying a Mal business for services.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: Service payment to onboarded Mal SME.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: As B2B-04 patterns at retail scale.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: As M2M-06.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Funding/investing into a Mal-onboarded business.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Crowd-collection into one SME (unlicensed deposit-taking / Ponzi shape).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Hard cap + review; many-investors-one-SME triggers scheme review.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Ponzi/collective-scheme detection: investor fan-in velocity to single SME - highest-value on-us scenario.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Mal business paying salary to Mal individual.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Ghost payroll fully visible on-us.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Payroll graph: employer-employee edges enrich entity graph; ghost-worker detection strongest here.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Mal business paying a Mal freelancer.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: As B2C-08.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: As B2C-08 with full both-sides telemetry.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Mal business refunding a Mal individual.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Refund laundering rings.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Refund-pairing hard check (original txn exists on-us).

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Mal business paying another Mal business.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Circular B2B rings manufacturing turnover inside platform.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: On-us circular-flow detection (5.9) at full graph strength; invoice-pattern analytics.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Transfers between Mal-onboarded group companies.
entries.acceptable_use_compliance_definition: As B2B-09 on-us with declared group registry.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Undeclared common control (shared UBO/device across "unrelated" SMEs).
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Group registry mandatory; UBO-overlap check systemic.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: Hidden-ownership detection: shared-attribute analysis across SME book is native here.

entries.description_shown_to_customer: Any purpose not listed - describe it.
entries.not_acceptable_misuse_indicators: Repeated vague usage.
entries.evidence_edd_trigger: Free text mandatory; auto-review above tier.
entries.tm_screening_relevance: "Other"-rate KRI; on-us free-text keyword scan.
